free_text: Typed Schedule A holdings, continuation of the 'M & R Trust Partnership' block (printed header repeats). All rows SP, all EIF-checked, all transaction P (purchase). Block C 'Other Type of Income' = 'PTRN' throughout. Rows 2 and 3 also show a Block C 'None' mark.

uncertainties.note: Block B value X columns faint; value buckets best-estimate, may be off by one bucket
